final_sql:
WITH "patents_with_inventors" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number",
    FLOOR(((FLOOR(t."publication_date" / 10000) - 1960) / 5)) * 5 + 1960 AS "five_year_period_start",
    COUNT(DISTINCT inv.index) AS "inventor_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."inventor") AS inv
  WHERE t."country_code" = 'CA'
    AND t."publication_date" >= 19600101
    AND t."publication_date" < 20210101
    AND FLOOR(t."publication_date" / 10000) BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
  GROUP BY
    t."publication_number",
    FLOOR(((FLOOR(t."publication_date" / 10000) - 1960) / 5)) * 5 + 1960
)
SELECT
  "five_year_period_start",
  "five_year_period_start" + 4 AS "five_year_period_end",
  AVG("inventor_count") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "total_patent_publications"
FROM "patents_with_inventors"
GROUP BY
  "five_year_period_start"
ORDER BY
  "five_year_period_start" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    t."publication_number",
    t."country_code",
    ah.value:"name"::TEXT AS "assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(REGEXP_SUBSTR(t."publication_number", '[0-9]{4}[0-9]*'), 'YYYY')) AS "publication_year"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."assignee_harmonized") AS ah,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."ipc") AS ipc
  WHERE ipc.value:"symbol"::TEXT ILIKE 'A61%'
    AND ah.value:"name"::TEXT IS NOT NULL
    AND t."publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND REGEXP_SUBSTR(t."publication_number", '[0-9]{4}') IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "assignee_totals"
  ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "assignee_name" ASC
  LIMIT 1
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    p."assignee_name",
    p."publication_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT p."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS p
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS a
    ON p."assignee_name" = a."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY p."assignee_name", p."publication_year"
),
"busiest_year" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "publication_year"
  FROM "assignee_year_counts"
  ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "publication_year" ASC
  LIMIT 1
),
"jurisdiction_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    p."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT p."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS p
  INNER JOIN "busiest_year" AS y
    ON p."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
   AND p."publication_year" = y."publication_year"
  WHERE p."country_code" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p."country_code"
),
"top5_jurisdictions" AS (
  SELECT
    "country_code",
    "patent_count"
  FROM "jurisdiction_counts"
  ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code" ASC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT LISTAGG("country_code", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code" ASC) AS "jurisdiction_codes_csv"
FROM "top5_jurisdictions"

final_sql:
WITH "a61_applications" AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        "t"."application_number",
        "t"."filing_date",
        "ah".value:"name"::TEXT AS "assignee_name"
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "t",
         LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "t"."assignee_harmonized") AS "ah",
         LATERAL FLATTEN(input => "t"."uspc") AS "u"
    WHERE "u".value:"mainClass"::TEXT = 'A61'
      AND "ah".value:"name"::TEXT IS NOT NULL
      AND "t"."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
),
"top_assignee" AS (
    SELECT
        "assignee_name"
    FROM "a61_applications"
    GROUP BY "assignee_name"
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") DESC, "assignee_name" ASC
    ) = 1
),
"year_counts" AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("a"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
        COUNT(DISTINCT "a"."application_number") AS "application_count"
    FROM "a61_applications" AS "a"
    INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS "ta"
        ON "a"."assignee_name" = "ta"."assignee_name"
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("a"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD'))
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "filing_year" ASC
    ) = 1
)
SELECT
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "filing_year") AS "year"
FROM "year_counts";

WITH "months_series" AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), DATE '2008-01-01') AS "month_start"
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_us_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    t."publication_number",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(t."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_month"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."abstract_localized") AS "al"
  WHERE t."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND t."filing_date" >= 20080101
    AND t."filing_date" <= 20221231
    AND "al".value:"text"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
    AND "al".value:"language"::STRING = 'en'
),
"monthly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "filing_month",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "publication_count"
  FROM "iot_us_publications"
  GROUP BY "filing_month"
)
SELECT
  "m"."month_start",
  COALESCE("mc"."publication_count", 0) AS "publication_count"
FROM "months_series" AS "m"
LEFT JOIN "monthly_counts" AS "mc"
  ON "m"."month_start" = "mc"."filing_month"
ORDER BY "m"."month_start" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "family_application_counts" AS (
    SELECT
        p."family_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT p."application_number") AS "distinct_application_count"
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
    WHERE p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p."family_id"
),
"qualified_families" AS (
    SELECT
        fac."family_id"
    FROM "family_application_counts" AS fac
    WHERE fac."distinct_application_count" > 1
),
"cn_granted_patents" AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d."family_id",
        d."pub_cleaned"
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13 AS d
    WHERE d."pub_cleaned" RLIKE '^CN[0-9]+[A-Z]$'
      AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(d."pub_cleaned", 3, 4)) BETWEEN 2010 AND 2023
)
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT cgp."pub_cleaned") AS "patent_count"
FROM "cn_granted_patents" AS cgp
JOIN "qualified_families" AS qf
    ON cgp."family_id" = qf."family_id";

WITH "filtered_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number",
    REGEXP_REPLACE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, '[^A-Z0-9]', '') AS "ipc_code_clean"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."ipc") AS f
  WHERE t."country_code" = 'US'
    AND t."kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND t."publication_date" >= 20220601
    AND t."publication_date" <= 20220930
),
"ipc4_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    SUBSTR("ipc_code_clean", 1, 4) AS "ipc4_code",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_frequency"
  FROM "filtered_patents"
  WHERE "ipc_code_clean" IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH("ipc_code_clean") >= 4
  GROUP BY
    "publication_number",
    SUBSTR("ipc_code_clean", 1, 4)
),
"top_ipc4" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4_code",
    "ipc4_frequency"
  FROM "ipc4_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "publication_number"
    ORDER BY "ipc4_frequency" DESC, "ipc4_code" ASC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "publication_number",
  "ipc4_code"
FROM "top_ipc4"
WHERE "ipc4_frequency" >= 10
ORDER BY "publication_number" ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "base_cohort" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    p."filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON p."publication_number" = a."publication_number"
  WHERE a."publication_description" ILIKE '%utility patent%'
    AND p."publication_number" ILIKE 'US-%-B2'
    AND p."filing_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20141231
),
"citations_within_month" AS (
  SELECT
    bc."publication_number",
    bc."filing_date",
    COUNT(DISTINCT cp."publication_number") AS "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "base_cohort" AS bc
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON bc."publication_number" = a."publication_number",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => a."cited_by") AS cb
  LEFT JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS cp
    ON cb.value:"publication_number"::TEXT = cp."publication_number"
  WHERE cp."filing_date" BETWEEN bc."filing_date" AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(bc."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD'))
  GROUP BY
    bc."publication_number",
    bc."filing_date"
),
"top_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "filing_date",
    "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "citations_within_month"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "forward_citation_count_within_1_month" DESC, "publication_number" ASC
  ) = 1
),
"same_year_similars" AS (
  SELECT
    tp."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    tp."filing_date" AS "target_filing_date",
    tp."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    sim.value:"publication_number"::TEXT AS "similar_publication_number",
    COALESCE(p2."filing_date", sim.value:"filing_date"::NUMBER) AS "similar_filing_date",
    COALESCE(sim.value:"similarity_score"::FLOAT, sim.value:"score"::FLOAT) AS "similarity_score"
  FROM "top_patent" AS tp
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON tp."publication_number" = a."publication_number",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => a."similar") AS sim
  LEFT JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON sim.value:"publication_number"::TEXT = p2."publication_number"
  WHERE sim.value:"publication_number"::TEXT IS NOT NULL
    AND sim.value:"publication_number"::TEXT <> tp."publication_number"
    AND COALESCE(p2."filing_date", sim.value:"filing_date"::NUMBER) BETWEEN FLOOR(tp."filing_date" / 10000) * 10000 + 101 AND FLOOR(tp."filing_date" / 10000) * 10000 + 1231
),
"top_similar_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    "target_publication_number",
    "target_filing_date",
    "forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    "similar_publication_number",
    "similar_filing_date",
    "similarity_score"
  FROM "same_year_similars"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "similarity_score" DESC, "similar_publication_number" ASC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "target_publication_number" AS "publication_number",
  "target_filing_date" AS "filing_date",
  "forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
  "similar_publication_number",
  "similar_filing_date",
  "similarity_score"
FROM "top_similar_patent"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates
